northStar.name: Calm Editorial Precision
northStar.summary: A restrained portfolio system built on warm neutrals, thin structure lines, rounded surfaces, and sparse violet signals.

motion.principle: Motion should clarify sequencing and focus, never dominate the page.

do: Use warm off-white backgrounds and calm white cards.
Keep labels small, uppercase, and sparse.
Let spacing and hierarchy do more work than decoration.
dont: Do not use neon gradients, glossy black demo cards, or dashboard-like surfaces.
Do not overuse the violet accent.
Do not rely on loud motion or decorative 3D effects.
